summary: Tested the UserPermissionsPage toggle-save-persist fix and all related features. All 17 backend tests pass and all frontend flows work correctly. Verified: no double-toggle bug, permission persistence after reload, module None/All buttons, Apply Preset, SettingsPage navigation to /user-permissions, and count_sheets module visibility.

minor.issue: Old test file uses wrong credentials (admin/admin123 instead of owner/521325). Tests in this file will fail if run standalone. New test file test_permissions_toggle_fix.py covers all cases correctly.

issues: TOTP controls section (lines 411-430 SettingsPage.js) still uses <label> wrapping Radix Switch (same double-toggle pattern that was fixed in UserPermissionsPage). However this was not in the fix scope and toggle still works due to onCheckedChange on Switch. Note: Not confirmed as a bug for this iteration.

modules_loaded_correctly.notes: 13 modules returned by /api/permissions/modules: dashboard, branches, products, inventory, sales, purchase_orders, suppliers, customers, accounting, price_schemes, reports, settings, count_sheets

toggle_no_double_toggle.notes: Clicking Adjust Stock toggle changes state exactly ONCE from OFF to ON. The <div> onClick + Switch e.stopPropagation() correctly prevents double-toggle. No regression from the label→div fix.

unsaved_changes_banner.notes: 'You have unsaved changes' banner appears after toggling any permission. Disappears after Save.

save_button_put_api.notes: Save button calls PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions. Returns 200 with message. 'Permissions saved' toast shown.

persistence_after_reload.notes: Toggled inventory.adjust ON, saved, reloaded page fresh, selected testcashier_ui - Adjust Stock still ON. Then toggled OFF and saved - confirmed cleanup works too.

module_none_all_buttons.notes: Inventory 'All' button sets View Inventory, Adjust Stock, Transfer Stock all to ON. 'None' button sets all three to OFF. hasChanges correctly set after both operations.

apply_preset_dropdown.notes: Preset dropdown shows 4 options: Administrator, Branch Manager, Cashier, Inventory Clerk. Applied Cashier preset to testcashier_ui - toast 'Applied Cashier preset' shown, badge updates to 'cashier'.

settings_permissions_button.notes: SettingsPage Permissions button navigates to /user-permissions URL (not opening old dialog). UserPermissionsPage loads correctly after navigation.

count_sheets_module.notes: count_sheets module shows in UserPermissionsPage with correct label 'Count Sheets' and 6 actions (view, create, count, complete, cancel, adjust). FileText icon used correctly.

backend_put_permissions_persistence.notes: PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions atomically saves all module permissions and sets permission_preset='custom'.

check_perm_validation.notes: check_perm in auth.py: admin always has access, non-admin checks permissions dict, legacy module mapping (pos→sales) present. Unauthenticated requests return 401/403.

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.js lines 411-430: TOTP controls still use <label> wrapping Radix Switch - same pattern that was fixed in UserPermissionsPage. The Switch onCheckedChange fires correctly so functional impact is minimal (Switch handles its own click), but the label click fires toggleAction AND Switch onCheckedChange simultaneously - could cause double-toggle if the label click isn't stopped. Monitor if users report TOTP control toggle issues.

test_user_permissions.py old test file uses credentials admin/admin123 which do not match the actual admin (owner/521325) - all tests in that file will fail if run. The new test_permissions_toggle_fix.py uses correct credentials.
seed_data_creation: testcashier_ui had inventory.adjust temporarily set to True during testing (as a test), then reverted to False via save. Final state: testcashier_ui has cashier preset applied (from Apply Preset test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: UserPermissionsPage permission toggle bugs are all fixed and verified: 1) No double-toggle (div not label wrapping Switch), 2) Deep copy state mutation fixed, 3) count_sheets module present. SettingsPage Permissions button navigates to /user-permissions correctly. Backend PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions correctly saves and persists. testcashier_ui (ID: f57de378-c8e2-4ba0-971a-dc69f0f8a993) currently has cashier preset applied. Backend 17/17 tests pass in test_permissions_toggle_fix.py.
